summary: Wired IntelligentRoutingEngine into WorkflowEngine's approval creation. Added RoutingContext struct and RoutingDataProvider trait to core/intelligent_routing.rs. Added optional routing_engine and routing_data_provider fields to WorkflowEngine with a with_routing() builder. Rewired create_approval_request() to use intelligent routing when available, falling back to generic role. Created 3 integration tests and 2 unit tests. All files pass syntax checks.
decisions_made: Used builder pattern (with_routing()) instead of modifying constructor signatures - backward compatible, no call site changes needed
RoutingContext has a route() convenience method to avoid repeating parameter unpacking at call sites
Routing errors silently fall back to Role target rather than propagating - keeps approval flow resilient
next_steps: Build and run tests: SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo build && SQLX_OFFLINE=true cargo test
Implement a concrete RoutingDataProvider that queries the database for a follow-up task
